程序包 com.ifels.controlflex.api

类 ControlFlexApi

java.lang.Object
com.ifels.controlflex.api.ControlFlexApi
public final class ControlFlexApi extends Object
ControlFlex public API entry point. Bridge mods should use this class as the sole access to ControlFlex functionality.

All methods return null (or empty/false for primitives) when ControlFlex is not installed or not yet initialized. Always check isAvailable() before calling other methods in initialization code.

Thread safety: all methods must be called from the client thread (same thread as Minecraft's game loop), unless otherwise noted.

从以下版本开始:
1.0.0

  • 方法详细资料

    • isAvailable

      public static boolean isAvailable()
      Check if ControlFlex is installed and initialized. Returns true only when all providers are injected.

    • isControllerConnected

      public static boolean isControllerConnected()
      Check if a controller is currently connected.

    • getActionStateProvider

      public static IActionStateProvider getActionStateProvider()
      Get the action state provider for querying game/GUI action states.
      返回:
      provider instance, or null if ControlFlex is not available

    • getInputProvider

      public static IInputProvider getInputProvider()
      Get the input provider for querying controller hardware state.
      返回:
      provider instance, or null if ControlFlex is not available

    • getPlayerStateRegistry

      public static IPlayerStateRegistry getPlayerStateRegistry()
      Get the player state registry for third-party mod states.
      返回:
      registry instance, or null if ControlFlex is not available
      从以下版本开始:
      1.0.0

    • getApiVersion

      public static String getApiVersion()
      Get the API version string (e.g., "1.0.0").

    • reloadGuides

      public static void reloadGuides()
      Reload guide definitions from config/controlflex/guides/. Bridge mods should call this after installing or updating bundled guide JSON.

    • setActionStateProvider

      public static void setActionStateProvider(IActionStateProvider provider)

    • setInputProvider

      public static void setInputProvider(IInputProvider provider)

    • setPlayerStateRegistry

      public static void setPlayerStateRegistry(IPlayerStateRegistry registry)

    • setApiVersion

      public static void setApiVersion(String version)

    • setGuideReloadCallback

      public static void setGuideReloadCallback(ControlFlexApi.GuideReloadCallback callback)
